name: Eggplant-Tomato Chutney
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
2 medium Tomatoes, seeded and chopped (about 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook onion and garlic in oil for about 2 minutes.
3. Stir in eggplant and salt. Cook over medium heat for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the remaining ingredients. Cook for an additional 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are soft and no excess liquid remains.
About 3-1/2 cups sauce; 10 calories per tablespoon. To Microwave:
Place onion, garlic, and oil in a 3-quart microwavable casserole.
Cover tightly and microwave on high for 3 to 4 minutes or until onion is softened.
Add eggplant and salt. Cover tightly and microwave for 3 minutes.
Add remaining ingredients. Cover tightly and microwave for an additional 3 to 5 minutes or until vegetables are soft. Let stand 5 minutes. Serve with a slotted spoon.
